title: RecommendationEvidence
content:
# RecommendationEvidence


## Properties

- **type** (`string`): Type of evidence that is being used to create the Recommendation.
- **payload** (`object`): The payload of the evidence that is being used to create the Recommendation.

type.description: Type of evidence that is being used to create the Recommendation.

payload.description: The payload of the evidence that is being used to create the Recommendation.
